name: context-budget
description: Measure how full your agent's context is getting from weighted signals, pick a load mode, and budget tokens — plus a bloat ratchet that locks byte ceilings on every context-hot file and fires the day anything grows past them.

scripts.test: node examples/demo.cjs >/dev/null && node examples/ratchet-demo.cjs >/dev/null && echo ok
scripts.check: node --check lib/context-budget.cjs && node --check lib/ratchet.cjs && node --check lib/md-optimizer.cjs && node --check lib/archive-trim.cjs && node --check examples/demo.cjs && node --check examples/ratchet-demo.cjs && echo ok
